faqs.q: 1. How much does  Nidek Nuvo Lite Oxygen Concentrator cost in India in 2023?
faqs.a: The price of Nidek Nuvo Lite ranges from INR 55,000 to 60,000 in India.

faqs.q: 2. Where can I buy an oxygen concentrator in India?
faqs.a: You can buy an oxygen concentrator from Oxygen Times at the lowest online price. On average, it takes approx 48 hours to deliver the product PAN India.

faqs.q: 3. What is the warranty on Nidek Nuvo Lite in India?
faqs.a: Nidek Nuvo Lite comes with 3 years of warranty in India.

description_text:
Nidek Nuvo Lite Oxygen Concentrator

The American-origin oxygen concentrator, Nidek Nuvo Lite 5 LPM is one of the most reputed products manufactured by the Nidek brand. The machine provides flow rate from 0.125-5 LPM with high oxygen purity of 90% ( +6.5/ -3%) at all flow rates.

Light and Compact: Nidek Nuvo 5 litre weighs only 13.60 Kgs and is the lightest home oxygen concentrator in the current market.

Power Consumption: Nidek 5 LPM utilizes solely 290 W of power, making it highly energy-efficient.

Sound Level: This oxygen concentrator produces sound at just 40 dB, assuring it is as quiet as a library. 

Lockable Flowmeter:  Nidek Nuvo Lite comes with a lockable flow meter that has to be rotated to set the desired flow rate. This flow meter gets tightly locked at each flow setting and you will hear a “tuck” sound as soon as you set it.

Warranty: Nidek Nuvo 5 LPM comes with 3 years warranty.

Certifications: The product is FDA approved and CE certified. 

Additional Features:


	The machine comes with locks on all four wheels that keep it secure in one place. The wheels are super smooth and appear to be of top-notch quality
	It is the only 5 LPM machine that comes with 12 flow ranges from 0.125-5 LPM


What's in the Box?


	Nidek Nuvo Lite Device
	Humidifier Bottle
	Nasal Cannula
	Connecting Tube
	Warranty Card
	User manual
